title: Preventing members from inviting people to the account
excerpt: Is there a way to turn off members ability to send invites to people? Ideally, we want our admin team to send invites to ensure they have proper training and access.

posts.author: nstephenson (Nate Stephenson)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to turn off members ability to send invites to people? Ideally, we want our admin team to send invites to ensure they have proper training and access.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @nstephenson!

To ensure only admins are inviting members/viewers into the account, please deselect the option outlined in pink below via the admin settings:

Screen Shot 2023-02-13 at 4.41.24 pm1874×810 95.3 KB

This will ensure that sending invites is restricted to admins only.

Let me know if this helps
